definitions.usage_context_en: Una declaración o relato que aclara algo.

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL IT: He made a reference to the book.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL IT: I saw an advertisement for a job.]

definitions.usage_context_en: Un aviso o anuncio en un medio público promocionando un producto o servicio.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL IT: A notice or announcement in a public medium promoting a product or service.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL IT: I need to make a complaint.]

definitions.usage_context_en: Una declaración de que una situación es insatisfactoria o inaceptable.

definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL IT: A formal meeting in which someone is asked questions to see if they are suitable for a job.]
